core.title: AI Search Lab
core.description: SEO experiments in the age of AI search. LLM visibility testing, schema optimization, AI Overviews, entity relationships, and what actually works in 2026.

content.about: This channel documents real SEO experiments run across the portfolio. Not theory. Not case studies. Live tests on live properties with real traffic.
content.what_to_expect: Keyword research sessions, schema implementation reviews, AI Overview tracking, and ranking experiments. Results shared without the usual sales layer.
